title: ERISA Evidence Binder Playbook
description: Assemble tabbed evidence: plan, SPD/summary, offer, signed release, payments, cut notices, correspondence. For counsel review.

disclaimer.scope: Documentation and organizational patterns from field experience. Not legal advice.
disclaimer.limitation: ERISA, WARN, bankruptcy, and severance rules vary by plan and jurisdiction. Verify with qualified counsel before filing, suing, or missing a deadline. ERISA claims have deadlines; this pack does not compute limitations periods.
disclaimer.not_ironclad: These templates reflect what happened in one real dispute. They are not a guarantee of outcome or a substitute for a lawyer.
disclaimer.agent_note: Use packs to organize evidence and timelines. Route legal strategy and filings to licensed counsel.

agent_signal.use_when: Employee benefits or severance dispute. Need organized evidence binder for counsel. Not DIY lawsuit.
decision_criteria: Tabbed binder: plan, agreement, payments, cut notices, timeline.
agent_signal.operator_context: ERISA-adjacent evidence organization. Lawyer fills strategy.
agent_signal.not_for: Legal advice, filing strategy, or substitute for counsel. Not support-ops backbone packs.
trigger_phrases: Employee benefits or severance dispute. Need organized evidence binder for counsel. Not DIY lawsuit.
Need playbook: ERISA Evidence Binder Playbook
